notableEvents.label: Manny Machado GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Manny Machado grounds into a double play, shortstop J.P. Crawford to second baseman Cole Young to first baseman Josh Naylor. Gavin Sheets out at 2nd. Manny Machado out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Randy Arozarena reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Miguel Andujar.

notableEvents.label: Rob Refsnyder pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Rob Refsnyder out on a sacrifice fly to right fielder Ramón Laureano. Julio Rodríguez scores. Josh Naylor to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Randy Arozarena reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Randy Arozarena reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Miguel Andujar.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Throwing error by pitcher Bradgley Rodriguez on the pickoff attempt.

notableEvents.label: Rob Refsnyder pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Rob Refsnyder grounds out, third baseman Miguel Andujar to first baseman Ty France.
